summary: Advanced the Sound Test menu decomp in src/melee/mn/mnsoundtest.c by adding/typing several functions, data definitions, archive asset descriptors, and concrete header prototypes. The decomp.dev bot reported +1604 matched code bytes and +96 matched data bytes, with new matches for fn_8024B8B4, fn_8024BAF0, fn_8024B7E4, .sdata2, .bss, and mnSoundTest_8024AA70. Neighboring mnmainrule and mnstagesw edits in the visible diff are mostly include-order and formatting cleanup.
key_files: src/melee/mn/mnsoundtest.c — primary change; added SoundTestModelDesc, debug/assert strings, AnimLoopSettings constants, and implementations for fn_8024B2B0, fn_8024B7E4, fn_8024B8B4, fn_8024BAF0, mnSoundTest_8024BCA0, and mnSoundTest_8024BEE0.
src/melee/mn/mnsoundtest.h — replaced UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS prototypes with concrete signatures and typed soundtest_user_data.unk10 as HSD_Text*.
src/melee/mn/mnmainrule.c — formatting/include-order changes around existing menu animation code; no clear functional change in the excerpt.
src/melee/mn/mnmainrule.h — spacing cleanup in padding array expressions.
src/melee/mn/mnstagesw.c — formatting/include-order/line-wrap cleanup in stage-switch menu code; no clear functional change in the excerpt.
what_changed: Converted the first six frame triples in mnsoundtest from Vec3-style constants to AnimLoopSettings, enabling uses like vec_2.start_frame and vec_3.end_frame while leaving vec_6 and vec_7 as position Vec3 values.

Removed the disabled #if 0 mnSoundTest_803EF0A8 array and removed floats_2; exposed the needed constants as individual globals/static data that matched .sdata2/.data better according to the bot report.
Added static SoundTestModelDesc mnSoundTest_804A08C8 to hold archive-loaded MenMainConTs_Top joint, animjoint, matanim_joint, and shapeanim_joint pointers.
Added string constants for mnsoundtest archive section names and debug/assert messages: "Can't get user_data.\n", "mnsoundtest.c", "user_data", and MenMainConTs_Top_* section names.

Implemented Sound Test control/update behavior in fn_8024B2B0: cooldown handling, input polling via mn_80229624, menu exit, state toggling, sound/effect playback calls, selection wrapping, and proc swap back to fn_8024AED0 for one state.
Implemented transition/animation helpers fn_8024B7E4, fn_8024B8B4, and fn_8024BAF0 using HSD_JObj animation helpers, lb_80011E24 JObj lookup, HSD_GObj_SetupProc, and HSD_Text cleanup.
Implemented mnSoundTest_8024BCA0 to create the Sound Test GObj/JObj, attach archive animations, allocate/init soundtest_user_data, create title text, and initialize menu animation state.

Implemented mnSoundTest_8024BEE0 to enter the Sound Test menu, set mn_804A04F0 menu fields, remember current audio settings, load MenMainConTs_Top archive sections, create the Sound Test object, and install fn_8024B2B0 as a proc.
Updated mnsoundtest.h signatures from unknown placeholders to concrete forms: fn_8024B8B4(HSD_GObj*, f32), fn_8024BAF0(HSD_GObj*), mnSoundTest_8024BCA0(int), and s32 mnSoundTest_8024BEE0(s32).
smart_moves: Reclassified frame-range triples as AnimLoopSettings rather than Vec3, preserving layout while making call sites use semantically correct start_frame/end_frame names.
Kept exact archive section strings and grouped the loaded joint/anim pointers in SoundTestModelDesc, making lbArchive_LoadSections call structure easier to understand and reuse.
Used existing shared menu helpers instead of open-coding animation behavior: mn_8022EFD8, mn_8022EE84, mn_8022EC18, mn_8022F3D8, mn_8022F298, lb_80011E24, and HSD_GObj_SetupProc.
Managed HSD_Text lifetime explicitly during menu transitions by freeing non-null text handles with HSD_SisLib_803A5CC4 and nulling fields in exit paths.
Promoted header prototypes and user_data fields only where the implementation provided evidence, while keeping still-unknown fields as unk* rather than inventing names.
decomp_lessons: Animation-frame data that initially looks like Vec3 may actually be an AnimLoopSettings-style triple; using start_frame/end_frame names can improve both readability and matching without changing binary layout.
For menu procs, exact HSD_GObjProc setup order and flags_3 assignment are match-sensitive and recur across Sound Test/menu code.
SISLib text handles in menu user_data structs should be typed as HSD_Text* once their allocation/free sites are known.
Archive-loaded menu models often come as joint, animjoint, matanim_joint, and shapeanim_joint groups; a local descriptor struct is a useful intermediate before stronger asset types are known.
Do not infer behavior from broad PR titles alone: this PR had no body or human review, so evidence should come from the diff and the decomp.dev match report.
Formatting-only changes in neighboring menu files should be recorded as cleanup, not treated as behavioral decomp progress unless the diff shows codegen-relevant changes.
naming_conventions: Sound Test symbols use the mnSoundTest_ prefix for module statics and functions, with address-based suffixes retained for globals like mnSoundTest_804D6C40, mnSoundTest_804D6C44, and mnSoundTest_804A08C8.
Unidentified local/static functions remain address-named as fn_8024B2B0, fn_8024B7E4, fn_8024B8B4, and fn_8024BAF0 until a behavior name is justified.
Existing unknown fields in soundtest_user_data remain unk0, unk1, unk2, etc.; only pointer type information was improved where supported by HSD_Text usage.
Archive section strings preserve game asset capitalization: MenMainConTs_Top_joint, MenMainConTs_Top_animjoint, MenMainConTs_Top_matanim_joint, and MenMainConTs_Top_shapeanim_joint.
Concrete header signatures replace UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS when argument and return types are evidenced by the implementation.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Added unused f32/u32 locals and pad variables in mnsoundtest functions to influence stack layout/register allocation.
Used helper pointer aliases such as new_var assignments and exact temporary variables around HSD_Text fields to steer generated code toward the target.
Preserved match-sensitive casts and comparisons, including (u8) user_data fields, (u16) cooldown checks, and expressions like (u8)(-(s32) state == 0).
Used comma-expression grouping around multiple lb_80011E24 calls in animation setup functions, likely to match original evaluation/order patterns.
Changed arithmetic/frame uses from vec_X.x/y to vec_X.start_frame/end_frame while retaining the same three-f32 storage layout.
Included exact debug/assert strings and __assert call in mnSoundTest_8024BCA0 for data and code matching.
review_feedback: No human PR body, reviews, or review comments were present in the slice.
The only issue comment was the decomp.dev bot report for GALE01 b70db66..a614b86: matched code 66.38% (+0.04%, +1604 bytes) and matched data 38.72% (+0.01%, +96 bytes).
Bot-reported new matches were all in main/melee/mn/mnsoundtest: fn_8024B8B4, fn_8024BAF0, fn_8024B7E4, .sdata2, .bss, and mnSoundTest_8024AA70.
Bot-reported partial improvements remained for fn_8024B2B0, mnSoundTest_8024BCA0, mnSoundTest_8024BEE0, .data, and mnSoundTest_8024A958, so this PR did not fully finish every added function.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that finish matching fn_8024B2B0, mnSoundTest_8024BCA0, and mnSoundTest_8024BEE0 after this partial improvement.
Search soundtest_user_data usages to replace unk0/unk1/unk2/unk3/unk4/unk8/unkC with behavior-backed field names.
Search SoundTestModelDesc and MenMainConTs_Top assets to determine whether joint/animjoint/matanim_joint/shapeanim_joint can use stronger HSD types instead of void*.
Investigate data_2, text_ids, and data_4 in mnsoundtest for struct recovery and table naming opportunities.
Compare other mn menu modules for the same AnimLoopSettings conversion pattern from Vec3-style frame triples.
Check whether the mnmainrule.c and mnstagesw.c formatting edits were purely style cleanup or were required by later matching work.
